headline: ₹100-500 Cr range (long-term capex, not immediate risk) — Adani Power secures 25-year, 2500 MW renewable contract, strengthening long-term green portfolio
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD, and EU Taxonomy frameworks; no immediate penalty or deadline.
No near-term P/E rerating; long-term revenue visibility supports stable cash flows.
Potential for marginally lower cost of capital if green financing is accessed; no immediate bond spread impact.
